behavior_summary: This script implements a STRATHAT game object with a small area-trigger cleanup (U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea) and a more complex egg/rock interaction sequence (hatch, STRATHAT::01D7, STRATHAT::024A).

U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea runs when an actor/item exits the object's fast-area trigger: it marks/updates the object state, excludes it from some processing, then calls FREE::2A56(object, 1) to deregister/clear the object relative to that trigger.

U8P_STRATHAT::hatch is the primary egg-handling routine. It reads the egg ID (Egg::getEggId) and has two main branches: id == 0 spawns effects, manipulates avatar stasis/NPC movement, adjusts item quality, attempts NPC movement (pathfind or teleport), and iterates nearby items calling Item::use on matches; id == 1 calls FREE::2A56 on the egg, spawns U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::01D7 and may reset the egg id after scanning nearby items.

U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::01D7 gates behavior on the global stratosTakenBreath flag; when allowed it scans nearby items and either spawns U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::024A (rock-taken narrative branch) or spawns a FREE::1C19 effect fallback.

U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::024A implements the one-time rock-taking narrative: if avatarTookRock is unset it spawns effects, sets avatarTookRock=1 and hasBreath=1, plays music, and causes an entity to bark a long narrative string.
notable_control_flow: Event-driven: main entry is a trigger event (U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea) plus several 'hatch' style events that spawn and suspend on other processes (FREE::1C19, EFFECTs, METHOD::15E7).
Branching on Egg::getEggId inside U8P_STRATHAT::hatch creates two distinct flows (id==0 vs id==1) with different external interactions and spawned processes.

U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::01D7 uses a global guard (stratosTakenBreath) to short-circuit breath-related behavior; if allowed it iterates nearby items and may route into the narrative branch (STRATHAT::024A) or spawn fallback effects.
Multiple spawn-and-wait points: many operations suspend while waiting for spawned effects/processes to complete (as indicated by spawn + implies/pop patterns).
open_questions: Exact meanings of some item property tests used during nearby-item scans (shape/frame/value checks) — shapes and frame constants are inferred but not named here.
Precise timing and UX effects of the various spawned FREE::1C19 variants (what visual/audio effects each byte code corresponds to).
Which in-world entity produces the long bark text in STRATHAT::024A (the disassembly shows Item::bark but the identity of that item/NPC in the scene is not explicit).
Whether Egg::setEggId is intended to permanently reset eggs or only for a temporary state change (the script sets 0 in one branch; intent is inferred).

main_function.name: U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea
main_function.purpose: Handle an object/actor leaving the STRATHAT fast-area trigger: mark/update object info, exclude it from some processing path, and call FREE::2A56(object, 1) to deregister or clear the object's association with this trigger.
entry_conditions: Event 10: invoked when the avatar (or relevant actor) exits the STRATHAT fast-area trigger region.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit handler / cleanup and deregistration

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::hatch
function_map.role: primary egg-hatching routine; spawns effects, controls avatar/NPC state, iterates nearby items and triggers uses or further scripts

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::01D7
function_map.role: breath/rock gating routine; checks global guard and scans nearby items to decide whether to invoke the rock narrative branch or a fallback effect

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::024A
function_map.role: one-time rock-taking narrative: set flags (avatarTookRock, hasBreath), play music, spawn effects, and present a long bark/dialogue

function_map.name: FREE::2A56
function_map.role: external cleanup/deregister/update routine called with (object, byte flag)

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: external effect/process spawn used repeatedly for animations/effects

function_map.name: Egg::getEggId
function_map.role: query egg state/id used to decide hatch behavior

function_map.name: Item::* (getZ, use, setQuality, bark)
function_map.role: item utilities: read elevation, invoke use behavior, change quality, and make items/NPCs emit text

function_map.name: Npc::* (getDir, pathfind, teleport, getMap)
function_map.role: NPC utilities used to query direction, move via pathfinding or teleport, and read map id

function_map.name: METHOD::15E7
function_map.role: directional NPC action/method spawned with the NPC direction

function_map.name: U8P_STRATHAT::setAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: puts the avatar into/out of stasis during sequences

function_map.name: Kernel::resetRef
function_map.role: reset kernel/process reference used as a setup step

function_map.name: playMusic
function_map.role: play music/sound cues used around the rock/breath interaction

internal_calls.purpose: When Egg::getEggId==1 hatch spawns the STRATHAT::01D7 guard/routing routine to continue the breath/rock interaction flow
STRATHAT::01D7 may spawn STRATHAT::024A when a nearby-item scan matches the rock-taking condition

external_calls.purpose: Deregister/clear object relative to free/trigger system on area-leave (called as FREE::2A56(object, 1))
Read egg state to branch hatch behavior
Spawn visual/audio/process effects during hatching sequences
Temporarily immobilize or change avatar state during parts of the hatch/NPC sequence
Read NPC direction to select/launch a direction-specific METHOD::15E7 action
Spawn a direction-specific NPC action/movement as part of the hatch sequence
Attempt to move an NPC toward a target; fallback is Npc::teleport if pathfinding fails
Check item elevation/Z to gate certain hatch behaviors (check against constant 0x70)
Invoke use behavior on nearby items that match shape/frame/value filters
Spawn effects before and during the narrative rock-taking sequence
Make an in-world entity speak a long narrative string when the avatar takes the rock
Play music cues surrounding the narrative/effect to signal the event
Reset the egg id (set to 0) in one branch after scanning nearby items (intent inferred as resetting egg state)

reads.name: stratosTakenBreath
reads.likely_effect: Gate whether breath-related behavior should proceed (read by U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::01D7 to return early if breath already taken or otherwise disallowed)

reads.name: avatarTookRock
reads.likely_effect: Check whether the avatar already took the rock; if set the narrative branch in U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::024A returns early

writes.name: avatarTookRock
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 in U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::024A to record that the avatar has taken the rock and prevent repetition

writes.name: hasBreath
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 in U8P_STRATHAT::STRATHAT::024A indicating the avatar regained 'breath' as part of the event

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a STRATHAT game object with a small area-trigger cleanup (U8P_STRATHAT::leaveFastArea) and a more complex egg/rock interaction sequence (hatch, STRATHAT::01D7, STRATHAT::024A).
